vo_adrianavega_buildingthebifrost_bronze: Wow, just look at the progress on the Bifröst! It's going to be amazing once it's completed. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_buildingthebifrost_gold_0: I can't believe the Bifröst is finished!  [sentiment=Shocked]
(Happy Sigh) I wish I had something like this when I was a child, my face was always buried in history books imagining what these places would have been like... [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_buildingthebifrost_intro_: Oh, good, you're here! I've got some great news for you! [sentiment=Happy]
The Foundation have been discussing an expansion within their Norse branch, something to immerse and excite guests, and so I suggested another park! [sentiment=Happy]

We've secured this amazing location. It used to be an old research site, but it's also the perfect place to build a park inspired by the legendary realm of Asgard! We've already made a start, I got so excited I couldn't wait, but we need your help to make it spectacular. [sentiment=Happy]
Eugene had a what!? Please tell me you have a photo? This is something I have to see. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_adrianavega_buildingthebifrost_outro_: I'm incredibly proud of this site, of what we've been able to accomplish here. I can't wait for the Foundation to see the results! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_buildingthebifrost_silver: That is just the feeling we want to create for our guests. The more we can immerse them in the Norse world, the more fun they'll have and, in turn, the more they'll learn! [sentiment=Happy]
Oh? I never knew you liked to dance. [sentiment=Shocked]
Huh... I'd like to see that. (Chuckles) Until then, let's focus on this project. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_chapter1_070: Hello there, I'm Adriana Vega, the elected representative for the Foundation. I'll be the one overseeing the upcoming work. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_chapter1_080: The Foundation is dedicated to honouring our cultural heritage and ensuring that future generations can both enjoy and learn from it. After all, those who don’t know history are doomed to repeat it... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_chapter1_090: I see somebody's been memorising the Foundation's mission statement? Please meet me at the sites when you're ready to put that promise into practice. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_adrianavega_chapter2_010: Ah, I'm glad I caught you here. I was hoping to get a chance to... apologise. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_chapter2_020: I assumed Coaster Coast would be like most other companies, forgoing their ethics and morality for profit. But... you're not. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_chapter2_030: Ever since I joined the Foundation, I thought we had to be 'serious' with our work... I never imagined being able to have so much fun bringing the past back to life! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_chapter2_040: But now I see that it takes people like all of you at Coaster Coast to make it happen. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_chapter2_050: Thank you, for reminding me it's possible to have this much fun bringing the past back to life. You've inspired me with so many ideas and... I hope we can continue to work together in the future? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_chapter2_080: Oh, I'm so pleased! I can't wait to see what we will achieve together! ¡Adios! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_bronze_020: Oswald, don’t get ahead of yourself. I don't think this is enough to impress the Foundation just yet. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_gold_020: Yes, I must admit, it's heart-warming to see so many people actually enjoying learning about sustainability. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_gold_030: This is why I don't work with some for-profit company that only cares about the bottom line. The impact the Foundation can have on people, on the world, it's... (coughs) Anyway, it's nice to see. Now, where were we? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_intro_030: Yes, the Foundation is dedicated to making a difference... but I'm not sure why they have to do this with a theme park. I just can't see how a profit-driven project can become ecologically sustainable. It's going to send the wrong message. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_intro_050: ¡Madre mía! It's more than just riding coasters. What about the noise? Not to mention, the litter?  [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_outro_020: Yes, I do think the Foundation will be satisfied with the job done here. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_outro_040: I said the Foundation will be happy, Oswald. While it's true the park was a success, I'll reserve my own personal judgement for now. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_silver_020: Yes... I suppose I do like the new transport ride. It allows the guests to admire the true beauty of this area. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_ecopark_silver_030: (Ahem) That doesn't mean your work here is done, though. As nice as the rides are, we must make sure they can all be successfully powered by reusable energy. After all, it's one of the Foundation's criteria for this project. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_bronze_0: It really is! I could wander down there forever, telling mythological tales and getting lost in the moment. (Sigh) [sentiment=Happy]
What? I can make jokes too! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_gold_020: Nonsense. You wouldn't be able to 'escape' its charm! (Laughs) [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_gold_040: Ok, fine, I think you're all rubbing off on me... for better or worse. (Chuckles) [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_gold_050: I would have never dreamed of doing projects like this before! (Sigh) I'm... I'm very glad I met you all. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_intro_01: Ah, do you see it? The potential? Something to spark the imagination of our guests as they experience living history… [sentiment=Confident]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_intro_03: (Gasp) ¡Cielos! Sorry, I didn't see you both there... Eugene and I were just talking about the site. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_intro_04: The Foundation were originally excavating this land as part of their archaeological survey of the area and found, well... nothing. They were prepared to pack up and move on but then I noticed that the unusual layout of winding channels reminded me of an ancient labyrinth. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_intro_05: You see, in mythology, they were built to contain beastly creatures and ensure they could never escape! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_outro_01: This is exactly what I envisioned when I first imagined this park. I can't thank you enough! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_outro_04: Oswald! That was to mark our path out of here! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_adrianavega_labyrinthsecrets_silver_0: Whoa, listen to the roar of those coasters! They sound like the mighty cry of the deadly creatures that lurked within labyrinths. It's... otherworldly. [sentiment=Shocked]
Oh, underground? No, they escaped years ago. [sentiment=Confident]
(Laughs) I'm sorry, I can't keep a straight face. No, they don't. So we're fine to continue our work, just as we were. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_bronze_010: This is a great start! The place is really coming together. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_bronze_020: But with this hot weather, we need to make sure the guests remain safe while they're having fun. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_bronze_060: Oh, I couldn't possibly. There's too much happening with the park to- [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_gold_040: Don't worry, Brad. History is filled with great people who were all underestimated at one time or another.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_gold_050: But, for what it's worth, everyone here knows how great you are. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_intro_030: Alright, let's not get distracted. I didn't bring you all here for a suntan! [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_intro_050: (Chuckle) There will be time for that later. Now, I invited you all here to help the Foundation with our latest project. It's inspired by the mythological River Styx, so we'll need a brilliant ride engineer on our side to oversee everything. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_intro_070: I was actually referring to Brad. He's the water ride specialist, after all. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_intro_100: Take the time to relax. Enjoy the sun! Brad is always telling me how hard you work. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_silver_020: He seems to really love what he does. I'm sure he'd love it more if he wasn't working against people's preconceptions of him... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lazyriverland_silver_040: Then maybe you should tell him that... I think he feels like he's living in your shadow. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_bronze_010: I've just spoken to the Foundation. I'm surprised to say that they're pleased with your results so far. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_bronze_030: Mr Thompson, I would caution against any haste. This project needs to be done properly, with due care and respect.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_gold_020: Ah, I remember my first site. All those hours in academia, studying and dreaming about what was out there. But actually finding new discoveries, it never wears off. That feeling... the rush of unearthing history. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_gold_040: They never actually met, Mr. Thompson. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_intro_030: Hello, if I may take over from Mr. Thompson? Yes, due to the unique circumstances we have granted special permission for your company to build on the site, allowing you to restore them using the funds you raise.   [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_intro_040: It's not something we normally do but the coasters are in such a state of disrepair that, if left, they would not likely last. However, I can't say I'm entirely comfortable with a theme park company being trusted with such an important piece of our history... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_intro_050: After all, this discovery is the first true proof that Coastonians existed. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_intro_080: Oh, um, yes! That's exactly right. Sorry, I'm just not used to anyone really knowing who they are... [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_intro_100: (Clears throat) In any case, with this discovery, guests can really begin to learn about their lost heritage. So let's not waste any time! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_outro_010: It's... finally done. They're all restored. Despite the Foundation's questionable method, this really is a moment in history. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_outro_040: Hmm. That's a bit too much information, but it's an interesting perspective nevertheless... something to consider, perhaps. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_silver_010: I'm just checking in on your progress. I see that you've successfully restored the second coaster. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_lostmonument_silver_030: (Clears throat) That's good to hear. It's important for our guests to be able to learn about their heritage. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_bronze_0: Well, I'm glad you're both here! What do you think of the park so far? [sentiment=Happy]
It's rather beautiful, isn't it? In Norse culture, nature was sometimes thought to hold signs of their gods. [sentiment=Neutral]
I think we can really do something here to help our guests feel this way too... bring an ethereal feel to the park. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_gold_010: The trees here are beautiful. They blend so seamlessly among the Viking-inspired designs. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_gold_020: In Norse mythology, there was a giant ash tree known as Yggdrasil. They thought of it as a sacred tree, the tree of life that encompassed all nine realms within its branches and roots. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_gold_040: Actually, Brad, not all Norsemen were Vikings. Being a Viking was more of a job... Like you being a water ride engineer. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_intro_02: I've always wanted to visit a fjord! Such a magical location for a park... it feels like something straight out of the Norse legends! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_intro_05: You're right, I can see the potential. The mountains look like a giant itself slumbers underneath. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_intro_06: I can definitely share this with the Foundation and pitch it as a further extension of our Norse branch, as long as we can make it a success!  [sentiment=Confident]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_outro_01: Our guests are finally witnessing the beauty of nature! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_outro_02: I think it's safe to say the Foundation will be in awe when they see it. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_adrianavega_newnaturereserve_silver_0: Did you know, the Norse believed that mountains were formed from the bones of a giant! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_archipelago_bronze_030: I saw her on the phone earlier, I couldn't hear the conversation though... she was speaking awfully quiet. I heard stuff like, 'an island retreat', 'give me time', and something about bulldozing?  [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_archipelago_bronze_050: Hey, it's not my fault! I can't help what my ears hear! [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_archipelago_bronze_070: Yeah, I suppose you're right. Let's forget I said anything and get back to it! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_archipelago_gold_060: Can I just say, I can't believe how good you've got things looking here! You're smashing it! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_archipelago_intro_050: Not unless it involves paper work! But woah, this place is amazing. Just look at all the water! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_archipelago_intro_080: Speaking of treasure, let's dive in and see what we've got to work with! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_archipelago_outro_040: We'll head over to the next park. Catch you there! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_archipelago_silver_030: I think I saw her taking photos of the land and some of the rides. She seemed pretty serious... [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_buildingthebifrost_bronze_: We will invite these brave Vikings, spear in hand, into the halls of Valhalla! [sentiment=Confident]
Sounds like a worthy and fearsome battle to me! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_buildingthebifrost_gold_04: And now you're tall enough to go on the rides!  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_buildingthebifrost_intro_0: Ahhh, this is going to be so cool! Hey, (chuckle) Eugene, (chuckle) remember when you tried to grow your hair out into a Viking braid and you couldn't quite get the- [sentiment=Happy]
Pssst... Adriana... I have a whole album of photos... I'll show you later. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_buildingthebifrost_outro_0: Well, you don't have to be Odin to see that this park is worth ravin' about. [sentiment=Confident]
I mean, personally, you had me at the rainbow bridge. But this whole project was a pretty awesome idea! [sentiment=Happy]
We should go though, before I down a few more bowls of stew. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_buildingthebifrost_silver_: This place is really coming together! I can just imagine a huge longhouse here. Everyone eating and dancing around the hearth, telling stories over a hearty stew. Oh man, I'd love to have been a Viking! [sentiment=Happy]
Eugene, you'd be the Jarl, bossing everyone around. (Laughs) [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_chapter2_220: Huh... I bet he's fun at parties. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_bradnewton_chapter4_080: You can cut the act now, Betty. If that's even your real name! [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_bradnewton_chapter4_120: Ohhh shut it, Grandma! Put the book down and back away from the pen! [sentiment=Angry]
vo_bradnewton_chapter4_140: Yeah! And a contractor came down to the islands and asked us where we wanted the sign placing for 'Nana Betty's Island Retreat'. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_bradnewton_chapter4_170: You said you were going to take the company for yourself! [sentiment=Angry]
vo_bradnewton_chapter4_220: (Scoffs) Who would have thought Nana Betty was such a snake in the grass? [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_bronze_010: What a solid start. That coaster is looking amazing! I knew building on a canyon would be awesome. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_bronze_020: But, uh, let me ask you something. Do you really think Eugene is happy with this? Do you think, that he thinks, that I think I can do this? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_bronze_030: Wait, I've confused myself... Urgh, I just want to show him how much I've learned. It's making me all stressed. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_bronze_040: Woah, maybe I'm getting stressed because I'm becoming more like Eugene? Man, I really am learning! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_bronze_050: Anyway, let's crack on. There's still another coaster to finish. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_gold_010: Those coasters are wicked! They're exciting, the scenery is great and the guests are losing their minds! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_gold_020: Well, not literally losing their minds. That's a lawsuit waiting to happen, amirite? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_gold_040: Uh, yeah, I guess I did. Huh. Are you tearing up over there, Eugene? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_gold_060: Ha! Hey, I had a good role model. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_gold_070: Which is also how I know there's still work to be done. Let's get back to some tasks! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_intro_010: Have you seen this place? The heights, the sights... the potential for thrilling coasters is immense. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_intro_020: The previous owners knew it too. They had some lofty dreams for this awesome park, but their budget didn't quite match their ambition. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_intro_040: Look, I know what you're thinking: "Here he goes, Brad's got another park with debt hanging over it." [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_intro_050: And I have, but this isn't like last time.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_intro_060: I've done my research. The debt's not too bad, the thrill-seeking possibility for this place is massive, and there are two coasters already here just waiting to be finished. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_intro_070: You don't need to worry this time, bro, honestly! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_intro_090: You're not worried? Seriously? Usually your eye twitches by this point and you say, 'Bradley'. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_intro_110: Oh, woah, no pressure then… Well, uh, let's do this thing! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_outro_020: Are you okay, Eugene? Did you fall in the canyon? Should I call Oswald?! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_outro_040: Eugene, bro, you don't need to try to be anything. You're awesome just the way you are! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_outro_060: (Chuckle) Well, firstly, I'm not even sure people say 'hip' anymore. Secondly, we already make a great team! With your cognition and my ambition we're unstoppable. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_outro_070: Besides, we can't both be cool, tanned, and exceptionally good at riding waves. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_outro_090: Hmm... c'mon then, our work here is done anyway. I can at least teach you the basics. Just promise me you'll leave the armbands in the car this time? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastercanyon_silver_040: Hey guys! What's going on? Admiring the park? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_bronze_010: This place is starting to pick up! But I did think there’d be more guests by now. Do people not realise how cool this place is? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_bronze_020: …Maybe Eugene was right. Maybe this place was a mistake. [sentiment=Sad]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_bronze_040: Yeah... You're probably right. You usually are... except for the haggis-filled donuts. That was just all kinds of wrong! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_gold_020: It was a just a good hunch. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_gold_080: It was a team effort. Don't worry about it, bro. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_intro_010: Hey hey! Check out this beach. Amazing, right? Great sun, smooth waves and, more importantly, all ours! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_intro_020: The previous owner was a bit in over their head, just a teensy bit, so this park didn’t work out for them. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_intro_030: I have an idea though! I think we can pack this place with guests AND make a splash for Coaster Coast with… [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_intro_040: Water rides! Something new and exciting that people will come from all over to try! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_intro_070: Ahh… well… just a little one. The previous owner took out quite a few loans before the park went under… [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_intro_080: And, uh, now those loans are all ours. Surpriiiiise. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_intro_100: Mistake? No, I-I thought this place was great. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_outro_010: Wait a second, the loans are all paid off? The park is packed? Everyone's happy? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_outro_070: That means a lot, thanks bro. Well, I'm going for a celebratory plunge before we head off. Anyone joining? No? No? Oh well, your loss! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_silver_010: You know what, mate. I'm feeling really good about this park again. I mean, just look at this place! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_silver_020: I know, I know. I shouldn't let what Eugene says get to me... It's just that he's always been able to make me feel like the little brother. I mean, sure, I am the little brother, but it still doesn't feel great. [sentiment=Sad]
vo_bradnewton_coastline_silver_030: Anyway, beaches, water, and awesome rides? Why was I ever worried? Right, I'll let you get back to work. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_gardenpark_bronze_030: Wow, and you've still managed to stay friends all this time? See, Eugene. That will be us one day! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_gardenpark_intro_030: Hang on… Edith as in Aunty Edith? As in ‘For all your need-eth, call Aunty Edith’? Ah man, I loved that advert! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_gardenpark_silver_030: The press? But I'm not dressed for photos... and my hair?! I'll... be right back. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_bronze_030: It's all in hand! Safety is always number one! Some people just get distracted by all the cool rides they forget to take care of themselves, y'know? Sit in the shade, sip a cool drink. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_bronze_040: A bit like you, Eugene! Feels nice to finally put your feet up and relax, huh? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_bronze_050: Yeahhh, he's still restless. You should go and see how he's doing, Adriana! Go on... sit with him for a bit. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_bronze_070: Don't worry, the rest of us will handle it. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_gold_010: Hey, Adriana... thanks, for this. I mean, for believing in me... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_gold_020: Sometimes I feel like people don't really take me seriously… but I'm actually pretty smart. I might not be a genius like Eugene, but I'm a quick learner and I'm good at coming up with creative ideas. I just feel like people don’t really give me a chance, you know? [sentiment=Sad]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_gold_030: So yeah, I just wanted to say thank you... for giving me that chance. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_gold_060: Gee... you really think? Aw thanks, that means a lot. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_gold_070: Anyway, I'll stop distracting us, we should all get back to work! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_intro_010: Now this is my kinda place! I mean, have you seen this water... The way it just flows and glides, it's the perfect way to cool off on a hot day. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_intro_040: Aw, what? But it's a scorcher! I brought my unicorn inflatable and everything! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_intro_080: Alright, I like the sound of this! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_intro_110: Yeah, bro. You need to chill out more. We've got this, don't you worry! I won't let you down! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_outro_020: It sure does! And we got Eugene to relax too! Well that's no easy feat, believe me. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_outro_030: He seems to really like you. Just, uh... don't tell him I said that. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_outro_040: Hey, mate! How did you find the park? They're even better when you get to relax in them, right? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_outro_060: See! I learnt from the best. You've always been there for me, ever since we were kids, as you checked my temperature with your toy thermometer. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_outro_080: Ha! Anyway, we could relax here all day, but duty calls!  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_lazyriverland_outro_100: I knew you'd get a taste for it. Alright, I'll leave you to it then. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_bronze_02: Sorry we're late but we wouldn't miss this project! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_bronze_03: Besides, (chuckles) Eugene wouldn't shut up about it. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_bronze_06: Yeah, I've got to say, it's pretty sweet. Look at all these trees, and the water!  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_gold_030: Man, their stories were so cool. Being a Viking would have been the best! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_gold_050: Hmm... I wonder if they had ride engineers back then too. With a huge tree like Yggdrasil, they could have built some awesome stuff! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_gold_060: (Gasp) Can you imagine? A giant waterslide looping all around the branches. The twists! The turns! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_gold_070: ...I'm actually getting dizzy thinking about it. I'm going to go sit down for a minute. You all carry on without me. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_outro_030: Yeah, we've really hit it out of the park here! Big props, especially considering how big this place is... [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_outro_050: Ooo, can we use the longship? I've always wanted to sail a longship... [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_silver_01: Whoa, check out the gigantic progress we're making! It's really coming to life! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_silver_03: Boy, do I! It's such an epic story. Eugene read it to me when we were kids. The stones were the giant's teeth, the clouds were his brain, the sky his skull... [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_silver_04: Even the water was meant to be his bloo- Well actually, I don't like to think about that last one. (shudders) Kind of ruins my day-to-day, you know? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_newnaturereserve_silver_05: That reminds me, we need to build more pools here! Water pools... with water in them. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_bronze_030: Hey, sorry I'm late. The water here is amazing! It's giving me some sick ride ideas. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_bronze_040: Woah, so much work has been done here... maybe I did get a little distracted.  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_gold_020: Well, heh, when you live a life of excitement like I do, you get a feel for these things. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_gold_030: And... it pains me to admit it, but your planning and organisation really paid off. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_gold_040: Such a shame that I accidentally lost your next plans in the river. Those things really absorb water, don't they?  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_gold_080: I'm sorry, mate. I'll tell you what, I'll organise a search party for them, alright? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_gold_100: Wow, really? Err, yeah, I'd love that, yeah. Let's make these parks even better! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_intro_010: Hey, mate! So glad you're here. Eugene and I have been dis- [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_intro_030: (Interrupts) Nuh-uh. Not fair, Eugene. I got here first! [sentiment=Angry]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_intro_110: (Interrupts) Wait, why do you get to pitch first? Just 'cause you're older doesn't mean you get to- [sentiment=Angry]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_outro_010: You're not going to believe this, but I think I caught Eugene... sleeping.  [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_outro_020: I also just wanted to say sorry... we've been a right nightmare to work with. [sentiment=Sad]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_outro_030: Eugene is… First of all, like, a total nerd. But second… He's actually a pretty amazing engineer. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_outro_040: He's the reason I know how to build these incredible rides, but... I sometimes worry that we're too different, you know? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_outro_050: I didn't think this park was going to work out, but seriously, just look at what we've managed to achieve here. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_outro_070: Oh, nothing! Just about how truly awesome these parks turned out. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_silver_030: Bro, you ever think you might have lost sight of how fun making coasters is? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_splitpark_silver_050: Forget the sheets, man! I've got a few ideas on how to further improve the parks... [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_bronze_010: Hey... Hank? I'm just curious, who did you say was the agent that sold you this place? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_bronze_040: You're a very trusting person, Hank, as long as you're sure... In any case, regardless of who sold you this land, we're going to rise to the challenge! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_gold_010: Dude, this is a lot of guests for a small space! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_gold_060: So... you're not upset that they tried to sell you a dud? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_gold_080: It took a lot of hard work to get here, though. And without your vision, Hank, we wouldn't be here in the first place! Go team! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_intro_040: Woah, look at all this water! This is my kinda space, dude. Imagine how good swimming in-- [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_intro_050: Wait a minute. This is pretty, uh, tight for a theme park, don't you think? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_intro_090: Man, I'm psyched to see what we can do here. Hmm… where should we start? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_intro_120: (Chuckles) I did… but slap some guac on that salad and I'm in! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_outro_010: Hey, Hank. You've been deep into your phone for, like, hours. What's up? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_outro_030: What? Trying to-- Hank, that's amazing! Woah-ho-ho! For how much? [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_outro_060: That's fantastic! You found something no-one else thought would work, and we've made it into something everyone wants! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_outro_070: Still...you're not going to sell it, are you? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_outro_090: You're so right, this is the life… (Deep breath) I'm going to chill here for a while. I'll catch up with you all later. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_silver_010: Woah, this place is getting really packed. Just look at that creative engineering! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_tinylevel_silver_030: Ha! Maybe leave the cocoa on the platform, mate. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_010: In any case, let's get started! First we need to establish the areas we can work in, see what can be built and where. You can't just go planting a pool down anywhere you please. I learned that lesson on Eugene's 8th birthday.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_010_alt: In any case, let's get started! I've set out an area for you to work in. You can't just go planting a pool down anywhere you please. I learned that lesson on Eugene's 8th birthday.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_020: He really did love his first laptop, but it ended up giving a new meaning to 'surfing the web'. [sentiment=Fear]
